message:
Implement P3.1: Authentication UI for web viewer

- Add index.html with CSP-safe authentication page
  - Strict Content Security Policy (no inline scripts/styles)
  - Password input with visibility toggle
  - QR code scanner button for recovery codes
  - Integrity fingerprint display for verification
  - Progress indicator for key derivation
  - Responsive design with dark/light mode support

- Add auth.js module for authentication flow
  - Password-based unlock via crypto worker
  - QR code scanning with html5-qrcode library
  - Session management (memory + sessionStorage)
  - Lock/unlock state transitions
  - Error handling and user feedback

- Add crypto_worker.js for off-thread decryption
  - Argon2id key derivation from password
  - HKDF-SHA256 key derivation from recovery secret
  - AES-256-GCM DEK unwrapping with AAD binding
  - Chunked decryption with counter-based nonces
  - Deflate decompression (native or fflate fallback)
  - sqlite-wasm initialization (OPFS or in-memory)

- Add styles.css with comprehensive UI styling
  - CSS variables for theming
  - Light/dark mode via prefers-color-scheme
  - Responsive layouts for mobile/desktop
  - Print styles for conversation export
  - Accessibility features (reduced motion, focus-visible)

Part of Phase 3: Web Viewer (coding_agent_session_search-uok7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
